label: Public surface
name: winstonlin-site
summary: A lightweight Python-built portfolio site that routes case studies, notes, and project links without a framework.

label: Functions pattern
name: Object Storage Router
summary: Python pattern for routing one bucket to several downstream systems.

label: Repo utility
name: repo-onramp-check
summary: A Python CLI for checking whether a repo gives a newcomer a short path to first useful success.

label: Operations utility
name: incident-timeline-formatter
summary: A Python CLI for turning messy incident notes into a stable Markdown timeline with clearer handoffs and impact changes.

label: Planning utility
name: dependency-risk-check
summary: A Python CLI for flagging overdue, unowned, and dependency-blocked work in lightweight plans.

label: Workflow utility
name: decision-journal-cli
summary: A compact CLI for keeping decisions, assumptions, and revisit dates visible as work evolves.

label: Workflow canvas
name: one-page-canvas
summary: A lightweight browser canvas for shaping one-page strategy artifacts before they turn into heavier decks.

label: Docs utility
name: doc-ship-check
summary: A Python script for the last mile of docs cleanup before publishing or handoff.

label: Functions pattern
name: File Manifest Writer
summary: A Python OCI Function for turning batches of inbound file names into a compact manifest artifact.

label: Presentation tool
name: tiny-deck-linter
summary: Strict outline checks for slide decks before they turn into vague, crowded review material.

label: CLI utility
name: release-note-diff-cli
summary: A small Python script for diffing release notes without reading every line twice.
